Dear Aisha,

Thank you for giving us the opportunity to review your personal loan application.

We have carefully reviewed your application and are unable to approve the loan at this time.

This decision was based on a thorough review of your financial profile, specifically:

Employment tenure: You have been in your current role for 3 months. Our responsible lending criteria look for a consistent employment history of at least 6 months at the current employer, or 12 months in the same industry.

We have a responsibility under Australian lending rules to only approve loans we believe you can repay without financial strain.

What You Can Do:

Here are some ways to strengthen a future application:

• Continue in your current role and reapply after 6 months of tenure
• Provide additional evidence of income stability from prior employment
• Consider a smaller loan amount that aligns with your current profile

Free Credit Report:

You are entitled to a free credit report from each of the three bureaus once per year:

Equifax: equifax.com.au
Experian: experian.com.au
Illion: illion.com.au

We'd Still Like to Help:

If you would like to discuss other options or review your situation, please call Sarah on 1300 000 000 or reply to this email.

Thanks for coming to us, Aisha.

Kind regards,

Sarah Mitchell
Senior Lending Officer
